chapter_title.en: Chapter 51 – The woman gifts herself to the man

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/116)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/116)
text: لَا تَحِلُّ الْهِبَةُ إِلَّا لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ أَمَّا غَيْرُهُ فَلَا يَصْلُحُ نِكَاحٌ إِلَّا بِمَهْرٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, form Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinani,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The gifting is not Permissible except for Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, and as for others, so a marriage is not correct except with a dower’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘(A woman’s) gifting herself is not lawful except to the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, and in other people’s case, marriage is not proper without mahr (dower).”’
